svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 278px; height: 1px; padding-top: 380px; margin-left: 431px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: "Helvetica"; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Usuario
+ _id: ObjectId
+ email: string (único)
+ senha: string
+ tipo: string (usuario,editor,moderador,superadmin)
+ is_admin: boolean
- cidade: string
- estado: string (2)
- etapa_preferida: string
- ultimo_login: datetime
+ data_cadastro: timestamp
+ data_atualizacao: timestamp

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(213, 232, 212), rgb(31, 47, 30)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 278px; height: 1px; padding-top: 100px; margin-left: 431px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: "Helvetica"; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Recurso
+ _id: ObjectId
+ titulo: string
+ descricao: string
+ link_externo: string
+ etapa: string
+ ativo: boolean
+ aprovado: boolean
- data_moderacao: datetime
+ autor_id: ObjectId (ref Usuario)
+ data_criacao: timestamp
+ data_atualizacao: timestamp

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 278px; height: 1px; padding-top: 640px; margin-left: 431px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: "Helvetica"; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Noticia
+ _id: ObjectId
+ titulo: string
+ conteudo: string
+ status: string (rascunho,agendado,publicado,arquivado)
- data_agendamento: datetime
- etapa_educacional: string
+ autor_id: ObjectId (ref Usuario)
+ data_publicacao: timestamp
+ data_atualizacao: timestamp

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 278px; height: 1px; padding-top: 380px; margin-left: 1px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: "Helvetica"; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
RecursoBackup
+ _id: ObjectId
+ recurso_id: ObjectId (ref Recurso)
+ dados_anteriores: object (JSON)
+ usuario_id: ObjectId (ref Usuario)
+ motivo: string (moderacao,exclusao,edicao,rollback)
+ data_backup: timestamp

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 230, 204), rgb(54, 33, 10)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(215, 155, 0), rgb(153, 101, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 278px; height: 1px; padding-top: 380px; margin-left: 831px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: "Helvetica"; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
SistemaLog
+ _id: ObjectId
+ tipo_log: string (admin,seguranca,login,backup,permissao)
+ usuario_id: ObjectId (ref Usuario)
+ acao: string
- descricao: string
- ip_address: string
- user_agent: string
- metadata: object (JSON)
+ data_log: timestamp
